examples: The tobacco workers were paid on a piecework basis.
Production was generally in the hands of skilled individual artisans doing piecework under the tutelage of a master who was also the shop owner.
I get paid for piecework, not on a monthly wage.
Unlike doctors at the Mayo Clinic, he told me, those in Grand Junction get piecework fees from insurers.
It amazes and disgusts me how unscrupulous and unethical companies are able to get around the minimum wage laws by paying piecework like this.
